sentence: شْحَالَك؟ عَسَاك بِخَير يَا وَلَد عَمِّي.
raw: شحالك؟ عساك بخير يا ولد عمي.
ipa: ˈʃħaːlak ʕaˈsaːk biˈxeːr jaː ˈwalad ˈʕammiː
gloss_en: How are you? I hope you are well, my cousin.
notes: šḥālak greeting; ʕasāk optative (Gulf); monophthong ē in بِخَير (Gulf ay→ē, alshammari2026); geminate مّ

sentence: اَلْحَرّ فِي الدَّوحَة شَدِيد وَالرُّطُوبَة عَالْيَة.
raw: الحر في الدوحة شديد والرطوبة عالية.
ipa: alˈħarr fiː dˈdoːħa ʃaˈdiːd warruˈtˤuːba ˈʕaːlja
gloss_en: The heat in Doha is severe and the humidity is high.
notes: sun assimilation ad-d/ar-r; aw in الدَّوحَة; pharyngeal ح; geminate رّ; Eastern-Arabian sun-assimilation/emphatic phonology per (albalushi2016)

sentence: مَا أَبْغَى عَشَا، أَبْغَى چَاي حَلِيب بَس.
raw: ما أبغى عشا، أبغى چاي حليب بس.
ipa: maː ˈʔabɣaː ˈʕaʃaː ˈʔabɣaː ˈtʃaːj ħaˈliːb ˈbas
gloss_en: I don't want dinner, I only want milk tea.
notes: abɣā (Gulf); چ=/tʃ/ karak-tea context (alshammari2026); ɣ voiced uvular

sentence: اِشْتَرَيت ثَلَاث ثِيَاب مِن السُّوق بِمِيتَين رِيَال.
raw: اشتريت ثلاث ثياب من السوق بميتين ريال.
ipa: ʔiʃtaˈreːt θaˈlaːθ θiˈjaːb min asˈsuːɡ bimiːˈteːn riˈjaːl
gloss_en: I bought three garments from the market for two hundred riyals.
notes: double interdental ث (retention); ق=/ɡ/ (Gulf g-qaf, alshammari2026); mītēn monophthong ē

sentence: هَاذَا الظُّهُر الشَّمْس قَوِيَّة وَايِد عَالْبَحَر.
raw: هاذا الظهر الشمس قوية وايد عالبحر.
ipa: ˈhaːðaː ˈɑðˤðˤuhur aʃˈʃams ɡaˈwijja ˈwaːjid ˈʕaːlbaħar
gloss_en: This noon the sun is very strong over the sea.
notes: ظ=/ðˤ/ retained; ق=/ɡ/ gawiyya; wāyid (Gulf); ʕa-l contraction; interdental ظ retention and qaf→[ɡ] per (albalushi2016)

gloss_en: Come see this new device.
notes: imperatives taʕal/shuf; ha- demonstrative; ǧīm per the spec's primary /dʒ/ (alshammari2026)

gloss_en: The weather isn't very cold.
notes: muu negation + waːjid intensifier (Gulf; albalushi2016); ج=/dʒ/ in aldʒoː, aw→oː monophthong (jaw)

gloss_en: How much is this? Fifty riyals.
notes: bēsh interrogative 'how much' (Gulf; albalushi2016); interdental ð retained in haðaː; long ī bīsh

gloss_en: The appointment is tomorrow at five.
notes: bāchir 'tomorrow' — kaf-affrication ك→[tʃ] adjacent to /i/ (alshammari2026); mawʕid→moːʕid monophthong; sun assim as-s

gloss_en: My family lives in Al Wakrah.
notes: ahlī/sāknīn residence frame (Gulf; albalushi2016); ta marbuta liaison in al-wakra

gloss_en: Go straight then turn right.
notes: sīda 'straight', ʕugub 'then/after', lif 'turn' — Gulf motion lexicon (albalushi2016); ق=/ɡ/ in ʕugub

gloss_en: The machboos was very tasty.
notes: machbūs (national dish) — kaf-affrication ك→[tʃ] before /b.../ stem vowel (alshammari2026); waːjid intensifier (albalushi2016)

gloss_en: Where is Ahmad? He is not here.
notes: wīn 'where' (Gulf variant, kept as long ī to avoid the وَيْ diphthong seam), hinī 'here', muu negation (albalushi2016); pharyngeal ħ; respelled وَيْن — the sukūn-gated grapheme yields the cited weːn

gloss_en: How many kids do you have?
notes: ʕiyāl 'kids', ʕindak 'you have' (Gulf; albalushi2016); plain /k/ in kam (no affrication — [-high] /a/ blocks it, alshammari2026)

gloss_en: If you come tomorrow, we'll go to the sea.
notes: jīt 'you came', n(i)rūḥ 'we go' conditional (Gulf; albalushi2016); bāchir kaf-affrication (alshammari2026)

gloss_en: Yesterday I went to the market and bought fish.
notes: riħt 'I went', sharēt 'I bought', simach 'fish' — final kaf-affrication ك→[tʃ] (alshammari2026); proclitic w-sharēt avoids the wāw+wasl mater seam; sun assim as-s (albalushi2016)

gloss_en: Next week I'll travel to Dubai.
notes: al-yāy 'the coming/next', b-isāfir future proclitic (Gulf; albalushi2016); ay→eː monophthong in dubeː

gloss_en: Call me tonight.
notes: digg tilifōn 'ring/phone' imperative, al-lēla 'tonight' (Gulf; albalushi2016); ق=/ɡ/ geminate diɡɡ; ay→eː leːla; sun assim al-l

gloss_en: Peace be upon you. And upon you peace.
notes: greeting adjacency pair; ay→eː monophthong ʕaleːkum (albalushi2016); sun assim as-s; geminate ll

gloss_en: He who doesn't know you belittles you.
notes: proverb closing; illi relative + preformative yi- imperfect (Gulf; albalushi2016); ج=/dʒ/ in jidʒhalak; geminate ll
